title: Neo Adventure NC
description: Modpack centered around adventure and technology.
body:
Neo Adventure NC is a modpack that combines both technology, adventure, and beautiful immersive worlds together.

Neo Adventure is a successor to [Innovative Adventure](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/innovativeadventure). Which is a modpack developed by me and a friend of mine, This is meant to be the modern 1.20+ upgrade to that modpack.

We have all the best tech mods, and added compatability mods between them, so that mods like Create, Mekanism, Immersive Engineering, and Computercraft can work together.

We have added the exciting terrain mods of Terralith and Tectonic which works wonderfully together to create both a realistic and beautiful world.

We have added several performance oriented mods, that are meant to work in hand with Bobby and Distant Horizons to let people enjoy gameplay with 64+ chunk render distance.

For the adventerous players, we have added several weapons mod, and a bunch of structure addons such as Yungs structures, Valhelsia Structures, and Roguelike dungeons.
